Access denied - path outside allowed directories: /workspace not in /tmp/mcp-workspace, /tmp, /app
I cannot access the `/workspace` directory. Please provide a different directory within the allowed paths (`/tmp/mcp-workspace`, `/tmp`, or `/app`) where I can create the `reminder.html` file.
